etymology.description: 之(之) (zhī, "footprint") inverted -> 㞢(㞢) (zhī, "footprint") inverted -> 帀(帀) (zā, "to surround")
etymology.interpretation: The character 帀(zā, "to surround") likely depicts an inverted 之(之) (zhī, "footprint"), symbolizing movement or placement, which is indicative of encircling or surrounding an area. The concept of 'to surround' is derived from the footprint movement implied by its components.
